query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A vertical rectangular image showing overlapping vertical bands and gradients of gold, amber, olive, and brown tones. Soft-edged luminous shapes shift across the frame with no discernible objects, figures, or identifiable subjects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred abstract image with overlapping vertical bands and gradients of muted gold, amber, olive, and brown tones. Intentional soft focus eliminates all detail and edge definition, creating smeared luminous shapes that dissolve into an indistinct hazy atmosphere with no recognizable content.
